What do you think of the
new anime section?
 


 
Layout Revision: 02/04/2004
Website Founded: 1997
Webmaster: Jamjar
Live Stats:

Competition Close Date
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Thursday 20th May, 2004 at 17:32 GMT
  
Just a little reminder; the DBGT.com and HostXL anime fanart competition is coming to an end. The close date for the competition is tomorrow (the 21st May), then later on saturday, the competition winners will be announced. Be sure to have e-mailed all your entries to jamjarface@hotmail.com by midnight on friday. The link to the competition page is below.

*Competition Details
Member Section & Dragonball Z Movies
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Sunday 16th May, 2004 at 13:21 GMT
  
Hey, I've spent all of this week coding dbgt.com's new members section and uploading the first of the full media files. You can now download Dragonballz movies 1-9, the trunks, and the bardock specials. The movies are in real format; you can download the real player from real.com if you don't already have it. You have to register to download the movies, but trust me; its worth it because we will be adding alot of new full media from a range of different animes in the weeks to come.

*Get Registered
Two new ROMs up
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Wednesday 12th May, 2004 at 21:57 GMT
  
Hey, I've added two new gameboy advance roms to the games section; Legacy of Goku 2 and DragonballZ Taiketsu. I'll try my best to add new content to the website over the next few weeks, however it's going to be hard as I have some important exams coming up. Cya for now.
Anime Section Finally Open
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 8th May, 2004 at 14:32 GMT
  
Hey everyone, the long wait is finally over; dbgt.com's anime section is now open. There is an anime reviews section (credit to: spike and dante), an anime cel gallery with over 3000 animation cels, and an anime topsite where you can list your website to increase traffic. All of us here at dbgt.com really hope you like it.
Few Updates
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Friday 7th May, 2004 at 14:03 GMT
  
Hey, sorry for the periodic downtime yestarday; our host's data center was having a few problems. However everything is working fine now, On satuday we are premiering DBGT.com's anime section which will include an anime reviews section, an anime cels gallery containing over 3000 cels, and dbgt.com's very own topsite. I have attatched a preview of the topsite below.

Also check out this website; CleggPublishings.com, it offers a Variety of Services from Book Publishing, Web-Design, Graphics Design, and a Conversion to PDF Service. Guaranteed most affordable publishing service you can find.
Anime Review Section
 

Posted By: Spike
Date: Tuesday 4th May, 2004 at 20:48 GMT
  
Sorry for another delay, but i guaranty that the Anime Review Section will be up on Saturday, along with an Anime Cel Gallery. If there is any review you would like me to do email or IM me.
Return
 

Posted By: Valix
Date: Sunday 2nd May, 2004 at 23:13 GMT
  
This is val, I have been on a self help tour to find myself and so on. Well, right now I'am doing some anime reviews for the site such as outlaw star, samurai deeper kyo, mantantei loki ragnorok, and so on. Maybe even Fooly Cooly ^^. Also have soon aniime news I will drop later on today. Anyway talk to all of you eager fans later.
Anime Review Section
 

Posted By: Spike
Date: Sunday 2nd May, 2004 at 22:50 GMT
  
Sorry for the long wait, but we hope to have the anime review section up within the next two days. If you have any reviews you would like me to do email me. Also, if you haven't noticed there is some anime news posted, so check it out.

Music Videos Up
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Sunday 2nd May, 2004 at 20:56 GMT
  
Hey, I've just finishded uploading the collection of music videos. You will be happy to know that all the media is now fully working, and we will be able to start adding things to the website again. Also keep sending those competition entries in!!!

*Music Videos
*Fanart Competition
Anime Art Contest
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 1st May, 2004 at 10:30 GMT
  
DBGT.com and HostXL have teamed up to give you a fanart contest like none other. By Entering you will have a chance at winning our amazing first prize; one years high-quality hosting; fully paid for by DBGT.com. You do not need to be an amazing artist to enter, you just have to have a passion for anime and a creative imagination. The fanart can be in a medium of your choice: a drawing, a piece of computer edited art, some graphics, a web-page title banner, a fan-fiction or a character concept.

Click Here For More Information
Video Clips Added
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Thursday 29th April, 2004 at 17:05 GMT
  
Hey, the long wait is over, the first of the video clips are up and more will be uploaded shortly. I hope to also open the music videos section in the next few days - if you are a music video developer and would like your site displayed on dbgt; just drop me an e-mail and we can discuss it onlne. Remember to check back at the end of the week as we will be announcing a competition giving you the chance to win some paid hosting.

*Video Clips
Site Status
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Tuesday 27th April, 2004 at 19:21 GMT
  
Hey, sorry for the lack of updates over the last couple of days, I think everything is working properly on the server now. I have uploaded the roms and i'm currently working on the video clips, I hope to have those up by the end of the week. You will be glad to hear that the anime reviews section is due to open fairly soon aswell. I will post another, more informative update later on.
